[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up photo shows a young child lying down indoors with their face taking up most of the frame.

The main subject is a young child with short dark hair, light skin, and a relaxed, slightly closed-eye expression, lying on their side. Their lips are slightly pursed, and they hold a small green object near their hands, with one hand partially visible in the foreground.

The setting appears to be indoors on a soft surface, possibly a cushion or bed, with neutral-colored fabric in the background. The lighting is soft and even, with no visible harsh shadows.

Visual details include the child’s dark eyebrows, smooth facial features, and hair framing their face. The child’s clothing is a light-colored top with a high neckline. The small green item has a bright, saturated color and is held close to the child’s mouth and hands. The camera angle is very close and slightly overhead, creating an intimate, cropped view.

Visible Text: No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary: The image shows a close-up of a child lying down indoors and holding a small green object. The child’s eyes are partly closed and their face fills most of the frame.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No visible text in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- No extractable text present.

# Notes

- The screenshot appears to be a photo with no readable UI text, captions, or labels.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
